title: Alumni
content:
Stay connected to a global network
Wherever you are, whatever you’re working on, we want to hear from you. Stay connected with colleagues, friends, and mentors from McCarthy Tétrault and receive invitations to firm and industry events.
Stay connected to our network by subscribing to our Alumni news and communications.
Keep up to date on legal and industry developments by subscribing to our marketing communications and blogs .
See how we’re championing diversity and inclusion and learn more about our community programs and pro bono work.
Follow us on Facebook , Instagram and LinkedIn .
